summary: Base W7 — prescribed ~19 mpw (mileage bump from W6's ~17), polarized ~85% Z1, on the §2.A revised schedule (Hyp A Wed, midweek easy Thu). Mon DONE: Z1 easy 35 min @ 10:36/mi, HR 157 (coolest steady-easy of the block), held under the prescribed 40 per the mileage hold; hill strides HELD again (Adj #44). DOMINANT FLAG: the Achilles is reactive (Adj #34) — it gates two W7 calls. (1) Hill strides come online this week per the SI gate (§3.C/§11.A met 5/24, held W6 per Adj #25) and were scheduled W7 Mon, but they're concentric calf/Achilles load and §11.D bars a new lower-body NM stressor in the same week as a mileage bump — debut HELD until Achilles AM-clean (Adj #44). (2) Hold mileage (don't ramp to the full W7 doses) while reactive, same as W6. Calf 335 bump and soleus progression stay held until a clean AM (Adj #40/#42). Live load progressions waiting on green sessions: Incline BB +5 → 145 Wed (expect RPE 8-9, near top of LP; AMRAP/TM re-test due ~W8 deload), lat pulldown → 150 Sat (Adj #35), DB lat → 27.5 Wed (Adj #29), cable crunch → 70 Wed (Adj #32); chest-supp row 85 reassess Sat under fresher conditions (Adj #36); tri pushdown 55 / preacher 55 holds persist (Adj #38/#39). Shoe: Vomero for long/easy, Zoom Fly 6 short tempo only while Achilles reactive (Adj #34). Run-MHR retest still owed W6–W8 (now W7). Accutane tendon risk persists (§11.E).

Incline BB +5 → 145 (Adj #27; expect RPE 8-9, near top of LP, AMRAP/TM re-test ~W8); DB lat raise → 27.5 (Adj #29); tri pushdown hold 55 until clean set 3 (Adj #38); preacher hold 55 (Adj #21/#30); cable crunch → 70 if set 3 ≥RIR 2 (Adj #32); soleus 60s, HOLD progression while Achilles reactive (Adj #34); rear-delt 125.
§4.C W7 Thu midweek recovery (revert to rest on yellow/red mornings, §11.C). Vomero, flat, honest Z1 floor — no creep. Hold mileage if Achilles still reactive.
§4.C W7 Fri. Flat strides, cadence cap ≤180 spm (Adj #25). Anchor pace/RPE not HR (Adj #9). Shoe per Achilles status (Vomero if easy-dominant).
